---
name: Prompt request
about: Request or improve an asset generation prompt
title: "[Prompt]: "
labels: prompt-request
assignees: ''
---

## Prompt Target

What should this prompt generate?

Examples:

```text
agent sprite sheet
station icon sheet
room interiors
UI component sheet
effects sheet
background set
```

## Related Asset Family

- [ ] Agents
- [ ] Stations
- [ ] Rooms
- [ ] Effects
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Backgrounds
- [ ] Icons
- [ ] Props

## Required Style Rules

- [ ] Dark sci-fi RTS style
- [ ] No baked text
- [ ] No logos
- [ ] No copied game assets
- [ ] Separated assets for cropping
- [ ] Low-end hardware friendly

## Specific Items Needed

List the exact roles, rooms, effects, or components needed.

## Existing Prompt To Modify

Link file if this is an update.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Prompt is reusable
- [ ] Prompt matches `STYLE_GUIDE.md`
- [ ] Prompt names output folder or workflow
- [ ] Prompt avoids copyrighted content
